QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: Other Investment Products_10

question.text: The Senior Citizens Savings Scheme (SCSS) is available to individuals aged:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SCSS is available to individuals aged 60 years and above. Those who have retired under VRS (Voluntary Retirement Scheme) or superannuation can invest from age 55, within one month of receiving retirement benefits. **The Trap:** 55 years applies only to VRS/superannuation retirees, not all investors. The general eligibility is 60 years. **Cross-Exam Context:** SCSS eligibility and features are tested in Series XVII and X-B. Compare with POMIS which has no age restriction. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** SCSS offers higher interest rates than regular FDs and provides Section 80C tax benefit. It is one of the best post-retirement income products for senior citizens.
